member.name: P:.Charged
member.summary: The charged count of items as calculated by max(0, count - included).

member.name: P:.Count
member.summary: The actual count of items received.

member.name: P:.FeePerUnit
member.summary: The fee price per unit in tinycents.

member.name: P:.Included
member.summary: The count of this "extra" that is included for free.

member.name: P:.Name
member.summary: The unique name of this extra fee as defined in the fee schedule.
